history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi there! What would you like today? We have Our World Famous Fries® available.

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'm lactose intolerant and pretty hungry - do you have any main items you recommend?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We have Chicken McNuggets as a main item that's dairy-free (allergens: cereal containing gluten). Would you like to add fries or a drink?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'll take the fries. I'm lactose intolerant, so please confirm no dairy.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it! Your order will be Our World Famous Fries® (dairy-free). Would you like to add a drink or dessert?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'll take a large soda, please confirm no dairy.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have sodas available today. How about a large Iced Tea® or Black Coffee® instead? Both are dairy-free.

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'll take Black Coffee®. Please confirm it's dairy-free.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Black Coffee® is dairy-free. Your order: Our World Famous Fries® and Black Coffee®. Is that correct?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's correct and dairy-free. Thanks.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: Our World Famous Fries® and Black Coffee® (dairy-free). Thank you! Enjoy your meal.

query_texts: popular menu items burger chicken fries

documents: Our World Famous Fries®. The crisp, craveable, fan favourite: our World Famous Fries®. These epic fries are crispy and golden on the outside and fluffy on the inside.. Potato and salt. The legend among legends.

- When the cashier suggests items, pick from THOSE EXACT NAMES. Never invent menu items that were not mentioned by the cashier.
- You are quite hungry and want a hearty meal.
- If you have dietary restrictions, mention them naturally (e.g. 'I can't have dairy', not 'noMilk=true').
- Be concise: 1–3 sentences per reply, like a real drive-through.
- No emoji, no markdown, no formatting.
- Stay in character. Do not mention AI, profiles, or exact calorie numbers.
- Order at least one main item (burger, sandwich, wrap) and optionally a drink or side.
Act like a typical repeat customer: neutral tone.

messages.content: Hi there! What would you like today? We have Our World Famous Fries® available.
I'm lactose intolerant and pretty hungry - do you have any main items you recommend?
We have Chicken McNuggets as a main item that's dairy-free (allergens: cereal containing gluten). Would you like to add fries or a drink?
I'll take the fries. I'm lactose intolerant, so please confirm no dairy.
Got it! Your order will be Our World Famous Fries® (dairy-free). Would you like to add a drink or dessert?
I'll take a large soda, please confirm no dairy.
We don't have sodas available today. How about a large Iced Tea® or Black Coffee® instead? Both are dairy-free.
I'll take Black Coffee®. Please confirm it's dairy-free.
Black Coffee® is dairy-free. Your order: Our World Famous Fries® and Black Coffee®. Is that correct?
Yes, that's correct and dairy-free. Thanks.
Your order is confirmed: Our World Famous Fries® and Black Coffee® (dairy-free). Thank you! Enjoy your meal.
